nasb.text: So man lies down and does not rise. Until the heavens are no longer, He will not awake nor be aroused out of his sleep.

esv.text: so a man lies down and rises not again; till the heavens are no more he will not awake or be roused out of his sleep.

cnv.text: 人也是這樣一躺下去，就不再起來， 直到天都沒有了還不醒過來， 也不能從睡眠中被喚醒。

ccb.text: 人躺下便不再起来， 到诸天不复存在， 他仍不会醒来， 不会从长眠中被唤醒。
